channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Northeast US digs out from brutal storm that disrupted flights and canceled school
item.description: Neighbors, government workers and a powerful railroad snow-clearing machine nicknamed “Darth Vader” are scrambling to dig out the northeastern United States from a brutal snow storm.

item.title: For Northeast blizzard, everything was just right to roll up a monster snowfall
EU fails to pass new sanctions targeting Russia after Hungary objects
